config._comment: Filter signals where expected net PnL (after round-trip commission) < min_expected_pnl. RRR=1.4 matches observed avg_winner/avg_loser ratio. min_expected_pnl=6.0 = round-trip commission ($3 in + $3 out).

analysis.conclusion: Fee-aware filter removes 17% of trades but reduces CAGR and Sharpe. Removed trades have avg net PnL $2.24 (positive, just below system average $4.36). System already has layered quality filters (RS, breadth, min_confidence) that screen marginal signals. Adding fee-aware filter creates over-filtering. Alternative approach: raise min_position_value from $500 to $750 to reduce commission drag %.
analysis.next_action: Disabled. Proceed to Phase 3 Item 2: Simple Regime Filter (MA slope + breadth).
